subcodes.first_line: All things have borne witness unto the Lord of Names, and the Tongue of Grandeur hath testified in the Kingdom of Utterance, yet the people [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهدت الاشیاء لمالک الاسماء و شهد لسان العظمه فی ملکوت البیان ولکن الناس
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
